description: Billing data from Google Sheets (remove upload gate), My Tasks to top bar, Staff Registry split, task board fixes (seed data + module statuses), reporting enhancements (time windows + expand modals + payer mix bug).

userStories.title: Fetch billing data from Google Sheets API
userStories.description: As a developer, I need BillingDataProvider to fetch billing data from the Google Sheet instead of requiring an xlsx upload.
acceptanceCriteria: Add fetchBillingFromSheet(accessToken, sheetId) function to sheets.js that reads two tabs: 'unpaid at 350pm' and 'ins unbilled' from VITE_BILLING_SHEET_ID
URL-encode tab names for Sheets API calls (same pattern as 'Need to Check')
Read header row first to confirm column positions, then use fixed indices for data rows

Column mapping for 'unpaid at 350pm': [0] Date of Service, [1] Client Name, [2] Clinician, [3] Billing Code, [4] Payer, [5] Billed Amount, [6] Insurance Payment Status, [7] Client Payment Status, [8] Date Billed, [9] Notes
Column mapping for 'ins unbilled': same header-confirmation pattern, key fields are Date of Service, Client Name, Clinician, Billing Code, Payer, Billed Amount
Reuse existing parseUnpaidClaims() and parseUnbilledClaims() from billing.js for row-to-object mapping — adapt if needed for Sheets API row format (array of arrays vs xlsx format)
Update BillingDataProvider in contexts/billing.jsx: add a fetchFromSheet(accessToken) method that calls fetchBillingFromSheet, parses results, and sets unpaidClaims + unbilledClaims + isLoaded
Expose fetchFromSheet via BillingDataContext so billing views can trigger it
npm run build passes
npm run lint passes

userStories.title: Remove upload gate from all billing views
userStories.description: As a staff member, I want billing views to auto-fetch from the sheet on navigation, never showing an upload prompt.
acceptanceCriteria: ARDashboard.jsx: remove the isLoaded check that shows upload prompt — instead, call fetchFromSheet on mount if not already loaded, show loading spinner while fetching
UnbilledWorklist.jsx: same — remove upload gate, auto-fetch on mount
ClientBalanceWorklist.jsx: same — remove upload gate, auto-fetch on mount
BillingReports.jsx: same — remove upload gate, auto-fetch on mount
If sheet fetch fails, show an error state with a retry button — NOT an upload prompt
Config page (/admin/config) keeps SpreadsheetUpload as a manual refresh option but it is not a prerequisite for any view
Data re-fetches when navigating to a billing view if not already loaded in current session
The accessToken must be available to billing views — pass from AuthContext or App.jsx props
npm run build passes
npm run lint passes

userStories.title: Make TopBar a global shell component with My Tasks button
userStories.description: As a staff member, I want a persistent top bar on every page with a My Tasks button showing my open task count.
acceptanceCriteria: Refactor TopBar.jsx to be a global shell component mounted in App.jsx (alongside Sidebar), not just in the onboarding module
TopBar shows the current page title based on route (Onboarding, Revenue Cycle, Voicemail, Reports, etc.)
Add a task button to TopBar using a checklist icon from lucide-react (e.g. ListTodo or CheckSquare)
Button shows a count badge of open tasks assigned to the logged-in user (status !== 'Done')
Badge uses accent color (#2A7A65) when count > 0, muted/gray when 0
Clicking the button navigates to /tasks
Remove 'My Tasks' item from Sidebar.jsx entirely (including the badge)
Onboarding-specific controls (search, view switcher, Add Client button) only appear when on onboarding routes
TopBar is visible on every page in the app

acceptanceCriteria: New component: src/components/staff/StaffRegistry.jsx
New route: /staff
New sidebar item 'Staff Registry' between Voicemail and Reports section

Displays table: Clinician Name, Individual NPI, Supervisor Name, Supervisor NPI, Notes/Supervision Details
Column positions confirmed via header row (0-indexed: [0] Clinician name, [1] Individual NPI, [2] Supervisor name, [3] Supervisor NPI, [4] Notes)
Add and edit capabilities with write-back to the Clinician NPIs tab
Remove org info card (Willow Center, TIN, Billing NPI) from ManageStaff.jsx to avoid duplication
ManageStaff.jsx stays under Admin — handles app-level access, roles, assignments only

userStories.title: Replace task seed data with 12 diagnostic blockers
userStories.description: As a staff member, I want the task board pre-loaded with the 12 real diagnostic action items from the Willow Center assessment.
acceptanceCriteria: Remove existing SEED_TASKS array content from sheets.js

Replace with exactly 12 tasks, all status 'To Do': (1) 'Define unified balance threshold across all service lines' / Erin / Billing, (2) 'Clarify deductible billing decision logic — who pays what, when' / Erin + Kate / Billing, (3) 'Define write-off authorization criteria and approval chain' / Erin / Billing, (4) 'Confirm secondary insurance audit scope and assign owner' / Erin + Lisa / Claims, (5) 'Resolve Sarah's clearinghouse access — is this an ESI contract issue?' / Erin + Sarah / Operations, (6) 'Define supervisor co-sign SLA — 48 hours non-negotiable?' / Lisa / Clinical, (7) 'Configure SimplePractice inquiry form — 15-minute fix, assign owner' / Sarah / Operations, (8) 'Clarify FMLA billing — patient-pay, not insurance' / Julia / Erin / Billing, (9) 'Confirm Google Workspace BAA scope — which services are covered' / Erin / Compliance, (10) 'Define Julia transition timeline and billing handoff plan' / Erin / Operations, (11) 'Discovery: custody agreement workflow — documents, custody types, who reviews' / Lisa / Clinical, (12) 'Discovery: age-18 transition — which documents require re-execution at 18' / Lisa / Clinical
Tasks are in-memory — reset on refresh is acceptable. Do NOT write seed tasks to Google Sheets
Task creation and status changes are also in-memory only (remove any writeToSheet calls for tasks if present)
Do NOT pull onboarding clients into the task board as tasks
Add 'Claims', 'Operations', 'Clinical', 'Compliance' to the task category options if not already present
npm run build passes
npm run lint passes

userStories.title: Module-specific task statuses in task board
userStories.description: As a staff member, I want tasks grouped by category with statuses appropriate to each module instead of generic To Do/In Progress/Done.
acceptanceCriteria: Define status sets per category: General = ['To Do', 'In Progress', 'Done'], Billing + Claims = ['Unbilled', 'Submitted', 'Resubmitting', 'Blocked', 'Written Off', 'Resolved'], Voicemail = ['New', 'In Progress', 'Needs Followup', 'Closed'], Onboarding = ['Urgent', 'Needs Paperwork', 'Pending Insurance', 'Ready'], Operations + Clinical + Compliance = same as General
Kanban view groups by category first, then shows columns for that category's status set
When category filter is set to a specific category, kanban columns match that category's statuses
When 'All' category filter is active, use the General statuses (To Do / In Progress / Done) as columns
Status dropdown in list view shows only valid statuses for the task's category
Drag-and-drop in kanban updates status to the target column's status value
Seed tasks from US-005 all start with their category's first status (e.g. Billing tasks start as 'Unbilled', General as 'To Do')
npm run build passes
npm run lint passes

userStories.title: Add time window toggles to onboarding report charts
userStories.description: As a staff member, I want to filter onboarding report charts by time window to focus on recent trends or see the full picture.
acceptanceCriteria: Create a reusable TimeWindowToggle component: small pill toggle (e.g. '3mo / 12mo / All') rendered in the top-right corner of each chart card
Each chart's toggle state is local (not global)
New Client Volume by Month: default 12mo, options 3mo / 12mo / All
Cancellation Rate by Month: default 12mo, options 3mo / 12mo / All
Cancel Rate KPI card: default 'This month', options 'This month' / 'This quarter' / 'All' — show selected window as muted text label beneath the number
Payer Mix Over Time: default 12mo, options 12mo / All
Clinician Caseload Growth: default 12mo, options 12mo / All
Time to Completion: default 12mo, options 12mo / All
Avg Outreach Attempts: default 12mo, options 12mo / All
Cancellation Reason Analysis: default 12mo, options 12mo / All
Data re-aggregates when window changes (not just CSS hiding)
